mapper.select:
with recursive eligible_roles as ( select distinct r.id as role_id, r.role_code from sys_user_role_rel urr inner join sys_role r on r.id = urr.role_id where urr.user_id = #{userId} and urr.status = 'ENABLED' and r.status = 'ENABLED' and ( (#{scopeType} = 'PLATFORM' and urr.scope_type = 'PLATFORM' and urr.scope_id is null) or (#{scopeType} = 'GROUP' and ( (urr.scope_type = 'GROUP' and urr.scope_id = #{scopeId}) or (urr.scope_type = 'PLATFORM' and urr.scope_id is null) )) or (#{scopeType} = 'STORE' and ( (urr.scope_type = 'STORE' and urr.scope_id = #{scopeId}) or ( urr.scope_type = 'GROUP' and urr.scope_id = ( select s.group_id from sys_store s where s.id = #{scopeId} limit 1 ) ) or (urr.scope_type = 'PLATFORM' and urr.scope_id is null) )) ) union select distinct r_store.id as role_id, r_store.role_code from sys_role r_store where #{scopeType} = 'STORE' and r_store.status = 'ENABLED' and r_store.role_code = 'STORE_ADMIN' and exists ( select 1 from sys_user_role_rel urr inner join sys_role r on r.id = urr.role_id where urr.user_id = #{userId} and urr.status = 'ENABLED' and r.status = 'ENABLED' and ( (urr.scope_type = 'STORE' and urr.scope_id = #{scopeId}) or ( urr.scope_type = 'GROUP' and urr.scope_id = ( select s.group_id from sys_store s where s.id = #{scopeId} limit 1 ) ) or (urr.scope_type = 'PLATFORM' and urr.scope_id is null) ) ) ), direct_menus as ( select distinct m.id, m.menu_code, m.menu_name, m.parent_id, m.menu_type, m.route_path, m.component_path, m.permission_code, m.icon, m.sort_no, m.visible, m.status, er.role_code from eligible_roles er inner join sys_role_menu_rel rmr on rmr.role_id = er.role_id inner join sys_menu m on m.id = rmr.menu_id where m.status = 'ENABLED' ), menu_tree as ( select dm.id, dm.menu_code, dm.menu_name, dm.parent_id, dm.menu_type, dm.route_path, dm.component_path, dm.permission_code, dm.icon, dm.sort_no, dm.visible, dm.status, cast(dm.role_code as varchar(64)) as role_code from direct_menus dm
union
select parent.id, parent.menu_code, parent.menu_name, parent.parent_id, parent.menu_type, parent.route_path, parent.component_path, parent.permission_code, parent.icon, parent.sort_no, parent.visible, parent.status, cast(null as varchar(64)) as role_code from sys_menu parent inner join menu_tree child on child.parent_id = parent.id where parent.status = 'ENABLED' ) select distinct mt.id, mt.menu_code, mt.menu_name, mt.parent_id, mt.menu_type, mt.route_path, mt.component_path, mt.permission_code, mt.icon, mt.sort_no, mt.visible, mt.status, mt.role_code from menu_tree mt where mt.menu_type in ('DIRECTORY', 'MENU') and ( #{scopeType} != 'STORE' or mt.menu_code like 'STORE_BIZ_%' ) order by mt.sort_no asc, mt.id asc
